english_description: A toggle that can be flipped and observed, used to demonstrate the trait/enum concept-kind composition mechanism.

commands.english: Flip the toggle to the opposite state.

constraints.english: Flipping the toggle changes its on/off state.

adversary_table.scenario: Flip is called twice in a row.
adversary_table.violates: toggle state changes on every flip
adversary_table.resolution: Second flip returns the toggle to its original state; no panics.
